hybrid.query: Under what conditions is an undergraduate student considered academically deficient (probation/warning triggers)?
How are Semester GPA and CGPA reported/approved in the official results?
What is the policy when a student misses the mid semester examination due to acceptable reasons (make-up timing)?
What is the policy when a student misses the end semester examination due to acceptable reasons (make-up timing/limits)?
Can a student repeat a course to clear an F/XF or improve the grade, and how are old vs new grades shown/used in CGPA?
What is the maximum number of courses a student may repeat during the degree (per the policy)?
What are the conditions for award of an undergraduate degree (completion of prescribed requirements and minimum criteria)?
What minimum CGPA is mentioned for successful completion of degree programs (as stated in the handbook grading section)?
When is tuition fee payable in the semester system, and what does the fee structure annex specify?
What happens if a student does not deposit dues/fee on time (restrictions/penalties such as 25% fee to keep registration intact)?
What does the code of conduct say about enforcement and disciplinary action/penalties for misconduct?
What are the rules for thesis evaluation and defence (committee, external evaluation, and defence scheduling)?
What is the grading scale and grade points (e.g., 4.00, 3.50, 3.00 ...) used for percentage marks?
What is the deferment policy during a degree (conditions and the 25% tuition fee rule during deferment)?
What are the examination rules about unfair means and exam conduct (warnings, forbidden material, seating, start rules)?
